subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Zuhur (Tablet of the Manifestation)
subcodes.first_line: O thou who art gazing toward the direction of God and submerged in His Nearness and Good-pleasure! Know thou that, verily, the "Manifestation" is not composed of the four elements
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا ایها الناظر الی شطر الله و المتغمس فی بحر قربه و رضاه فاعلم بان الظهور
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @growth and progress is gradual and according to capacity, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God
